narrative:
Jackson-Combined township has 2,271 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.8 percentage points.
